summary: A 3D scene featuring Stitch and Angel playing outside (cartoonish style with disclaimer). Frog content removed. Stitch will have glasses added.

existing_features.title: Add a pair of round glasses to the Stitch character in the 3D scene. The glasses should be rendered as a 3D geometry (two circular lens frames connected by a nose bridge) positioned correctly on Stitch's face, matching his cartoon proportions and color palette (e.g., dark-framed or wireframe glasses).

Add a 3D necklace accessory to the Stitch character in FrogScene.tsx. The necklace should be rendered as a 3D geometry (a chain or band looping around the neck, with a small pendant or bead element) positioned correctly around Stitch's neck, matching his cartoon proportions and color palette (e.g., gold or dark metallic tones).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a necklace to a character (likely Stitch or Angel)
